コトノによれば、狼の襲撃を受けたのはこの周辺らしいが……。<br>思った通り、あ:
According to Kotono, the wolf attack was around here... Just like I
thought, there are signs of monsters and animals everywhere.
ハツネ、モンスターの位置は分かるか？: Hatsune, can you tell where the monsters are?
もちろんだ。<br>あたしの目と鼻をごまかせるやつなんて、そうそういないさ。: Of course. There aren't many who can fool my eyes and nose.
――こっちだ。足元に木の根があるからな。<br>気をつけてついてこいよ。:
—This way. Watch your step—there are tree roots. Stay close and
follow me.
しかし、お前がいてくれてよかったよ。<br>俺だけじゃあ、灯りを使わなきゃ夜の森:
But I'm glad you're here. On my own, I wouldn't be able to walk
through a night forest without a light.
だったらお前、なんの役に立つんだよ？<br>やっぱり、あたし１人でよかったんじゃ: Then what use are you? Wouldn't it have been better if I came alone?
こう見えて場数は踏んでいるんでね。<br>いずれ役に立って見せるさ。:
I may not look it, but I've been through plenty. I'll prove myself useful
eventually.
……間違ないっ！ 若殿の匂いだ！: ...No doubt about it! It's the young master's scent!
獣人の嗅覚はさすがだな。<br>その匂い、追えそうか？: As expected of a Beastkin's sense of smell. Can you track that scent?
当然だ！<br>こっちに続いてる……: Of course! It continues this way...
なんだよ！<br>邪魔すんな！: What! Don't get in my way!
視野が狭くなってるぞ。<br>右の木を見ろ。: You're getting tunnel vision. Look at that tree on the right.
はぁ！？ 木がどうかしたのかよ？<br>いったいなんのこと……: Huh? What about the tree? What are you on about?
大型の肉食獣が爪を研いだ痕跡だ。<br>この辺りを縄張りにしてるんだろう。:
These are claw marks from a large carnivore. It's probably staked out
this area as its territory.
急ぐ気持ちは分かるが、ここは慎重に迂回しよう。<br>獣を刺激してしまったら、行:
I know you want to rush, but let's detour carefully. If we provoke the
beast, finding the missing person will be the least of our worries.
……そうだな。お前の言う通りだ。<br>左から迂回していくぞ。: ...Yeah, you're right. We'll circle around from the left.
よし。素直なところもあるじゃないか。: Good. You can listen when you want to, huh.
（こいつ……ただ偉そうなだけじゃないみたいだな。<br>冷静だし、知識もある）: (This guy... he's not just all talk. He's calm and knows his stuff.)
（そういえば、コトノが『旦那様』とか呼んでいたっけ……。<br>まさか、あのコト:
(Now that I think about it, Kotono was calling him 'Master'... Could it
be that Kotono actually chose this guy as her new Master?)
（この男……いったい何者だ？）: (This guy... who the hell is he?)
何か見つけたのか？<br>……ん？ 地面になにか刺さっているな。それは……短刀か:
Did you find something? ...Huh? There's something stuck in the
ground. Is that a short sword?
この短刀は……領主さまが若殿に渡したものだ！<br>次期当主の証でもある大事なも:
This short sword... the Lord gave it to the Young Master as proof of
succession! He always kept it close.
長さからして、せいぜい護身用だな。<br>実戦では、カタナを失くした時くらいしか:
Judging by its length, it's only good for self-defense. In a real fight,
you'd only use it if you lost your katana.
つまり……最後の手段に頼らなきゃいけないくらい、<br>追い詰められていたってこ: So... he was desperate enough to have to fall back on his last resort.
っ……！ 地面に血が……！<br>こんなにたくさん……！: *gasp*... Blood on the ground! So much...
周りの草も踏み荒らされている。<br>ここでモンスターと戦ったらしいな。:
The grass around here is trampled too. Looks like they fought a
monster here.
近くには……もういないみたいだな。: He's not nearby... seems like he's gone.
（戦いながら逃げたか、それとも敗北して巣穴に連れ帰られたか？<br>……いや、待:
(Did he escape while fighting, or was he defeated and taken to its
den? ...No, wait. Considering wolf behavior around here...)
そんな……っ、若殿……！<br>あたしがお守りしなきゃいけなかったのに……！: No... Young Master... I was supposed to protect you!
落ち着け。まだ死んだとは決まってない。: Calm down. It's not certain he's dead yet.
気休めはよせ……！ これだけの出血で生きてるわけがない！<br>死体だってない…:
Don't give me that crap. There's no way he's alive with this much
blood, and no body... The Young Master's been eaten by the monster!
だから、落ち着けって。<br>見てみろ。血だまりに動物の毛が落ちている。: Like I said, calm down. Look—there's animal hair in the pool of blood.
お前の若殿はモンスターと戦う中で、相手にも手傷を負わせたってことだ。<br>だと:
It means your Young Lord fought the monster and wounded it too. If
that's the case, then not all this blood is his.
それに、狼型のモンスターは巣に獲物を持ち帰る習性はない。<br>そしてここに若殿:
Besides, wolf-type monsters don't carry prey back to their dens. And
there's no body of the Young Lord here.
つまり、まだ生きている可能性は十分にあるってことだ。: In short, there's a strong possibility he's still alive.
ほ……ほんとうか……？<br>若殿、無事なのか……？: R...really...? Is the Young Lord... safe...?
恐らくな。だが、今も危険な状況にあるのは変わらないだろう。<br>お前が諦めたら:
Probably. But he's still in danger. If you give up, even what could still
be done will be too late. You get that?
だったら、こんなところで泣いてる場合じゃない。<br>先へ進むぞ。若殿を助けられ:
Then there's no time for crying. We're moving forward. You're the
only one who can save the Young Lord.
……分かった！ 若殿の匂いは……<br>……こっちだ！ こっちに続いてる！: ...Okay! The Young Lord's scent... this way! It leads this way!
……いた！ あそこの木の上！ ……若殿だ！<br>あそこの木の上にいるぞ！: ...There! Up on that tree! It's the Young Lord! He's up there!
走ってたんじゃ逃げられないと判断して、<br>木の上に登ったのか。賢明な判断だ。:
He must have realized he couldn't escape by running and climbed a
tree. Clever decision. But...
狼が木の根元で狙っている……。<br>獲物が力尽きるのを待ってるってわけか。:
The wolf is circling at the base of the tree... Waiting for its prey to
tire out.
若殿、顔が真っ青だ……！: Young Lord, you're pale as a ghost...!
だいぶ血を流したみたいだな。意識を保つのもやっとだろう。<br>……まずいな。あ:
He's lost a lot of blood. He must be struggling to stay conscious.
...Not good. If he falls from there, it's game over.
若殿っ、今このハツネが助けに参ります！: Young Lord! I'm coming to save you!
待てっ！ 相手はコトノが苦戦するほどの手合いだ！<br>闇雲に突っ込んでどうにか:
Hold on! That thing gave Kotono a hard time! It's not the kind of
enemy you can take on by charging in recklessly!
なら、あたしが囮になる！<br>お前はその間に若殿を基地に連れ帰ってくれ！:
Then I'll be the decoy! You take the Young Master back to base while
I distract it!
バカを言うな。<br>お前が犠牲になったと知って、お前の若殿は喜ぶのか？:
Don't be stupid. Do you think your Young Master would be happy
knowing you sacrificed yourself?
うぅ……！ それならあたしはどうしたらいいんだよ！: Ugh...! Then what am I supposed to do?!
俺に１つ考えがある。<br>上手く成功すれば、全員無事に帰れるはずだ。: I have a plan. If it works, everyone should be able to return safely.
ほんとか！？<br>言ってくれ！ あたしはどうすればいい！: Really? Tell me! What should I do?!
お前には少々危険な役割を頼むことになる。<br>協力してくれるか？: I need you to take on a somewhat dangerous role. Will you help me?
当たり前だ！<br>若殿を助けられるなら何だってやってやる！: Of course! If I can help the Young Master, I'll do anything!
いい覚悟だ！<br>それならハツネ、まずお前は――: That's the spirit! Then, Hatsune, first you—
